text.message: How many times am I going to be robbed...
well it was you or red
just my blocks were awks, sorry
Me or the guy with a dev? Hmm..
I've been robbed 5 times this game.
kind of a toss up.  I was looking for sheep and I thought you would be more likely to have sheep because the 9 had been blocked recently.  I didn't realize you had been stolen from so much
And orange is obviously easily taking road lol
Like even the 3 being blocked only hurts me
I dont know if I've offended you guys but this is wild
when everyone accepts the trade ask for 2 cards
i had no choice, wanted sheep port, but no 9s or 8s till now is crazy
I get it. I would have gone there sooner too if I hadn't lost so many cards.
I don't think I can hold road against oj
Blue.. I was helping you keep road.
so you can sneak the win lol
Nah. Im just trying to survive
Blue is on 9 lol. Trying to give him the game?
